person.name: Cecily De Haccombe
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Cecily married John L' Arcedekne, 2nd Lord Arcedekne, son of Thomas L' Arcedekne and Alice (Elizabeth) de La Roche, on 23 Dec 1327 in Devonshire, England. (John L' Arcedekne was born in 1306 in Ruan Lanihorne, Cornwall, died after 13 Feb 1370-1371 and was buried before 21 Dec 1377.). Sir John was also knight of the shire for Cornwall.

Cecily and John L'Arcedekne were granted a licence to marry on Dec. 23, 1327, a papal dispensation being required as they were related in the fourth degree. She was Buried at Saint Blaise Church, Haccombe, Teignbridge District, Devon, England

«b»Children:«/b»
1.) Ralph (Stephen) L' Arcedekne, died before 21 Dec 1377

2.) Richard L' Arcedekne,

3.) Otes (Eudes) L' Arcedekne,

4.) John L' Arcedekne,

5.) Robert L' Arcedekne,

6.) Martin L' Arcedekne,

7.) Reginald L' Arcedekne,

8.) Michael L' Arcedekne,

9.) Isabella L' Arcedekne,

10.) Sir Waryn/Warin L' Arcedekne of Ruan Lanhorne, 3rd Lord Arcedekne d. fr 1400-7 Aug 1407

zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily De Haccombe於1310年出生在英國戴文迪維頓時，她的父親Jordan FitzStephen de Haccombe30歲，母親Isabella St Aubin27歲。她於1327年12月23日與John l'Achdecken結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1364年在英國可瓦爾享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文哈可姆。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Haccombe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Harcombe in Chudleigh (Devon), Sidmouth (Devon), or Hurcombe in Hemyock (Devon); the latter is recorded as Hertecombe in 1330.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily De Haccombe was born in 1310, in Tiverton, Devon, England, her father, Jordan FitzStephen de Haccombe, was 30 and her mother, Isabella St Aubin, was 27. She married John l'Achdecken on 23 December 1327. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1364, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Haccombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily De Haccombe est née en 1310, à Tiverton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Jordan FitzStephen de Haccombe, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabella St Aubin, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John l'Achdecken le 23 décembre 1327. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1364, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Haccombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily De Haccombe 1310 in Tiverton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jordan FitzStephen de Haccombe 30 und ihre Mutter Isabella St Aubin 27. Sie hat am 23. Dezember 1327 John l'Achdecken geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1364 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Cornwall, England und wurde in Haccombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato John l'Achdecken il 23 dicembre 1327. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Cecily De Haccombeが1310年にイギリスデボンティバートンで生まれた時，父Jordan FitzStephen de Haccombeは30歳，母Isabella St Aubinは27歳であった。1327年12月23日にJohn l'Achdeckenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1364年にイギリスコルンワルで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンハッコインベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily De Haccombe(이)가 1310년 영국 데폰 티버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jordan FitzStephen de Haccombe(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella St Aubin(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1327년 12월 23일 John l'Achdecken(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1364년 영국 코른월에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 하c코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily De Haccombe nasceu em 1310, em Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Jordan FitzStephen de Haccombe, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabella St Aubin, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John l'Achdecken em 23 de dezembro de 1327. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1364, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily De Haccombe родилась в 1310 г. в местности тивиртон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Jordan FitzStephen de Haccombe было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella St Aubin, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John l'Achdecken 23 декабря 1327 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1364 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности хаккомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily De Haccombe nació en 1310, en Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Jordan FitzStephen de Haccombe, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabella St Aubin, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John l'Achdecken el 23 de diciembre de 1327. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1364, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
